falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,200 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear breakout above this level would indicate a bullish trend, contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting the pattern is not analogous to the 2024 August bottom (which likely involved consolidation, not a sharp rally).

falsification_conditions.condition: The CBOE VIX spikes above 30 and sustains the level for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volatility would indicate a blowoff top or panic, invalidating the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by showing a clear market phase (panic) not aligned with the 2024 August bottom pattern (which likely had lower volatility).

falsification_conditions.condition: The 10-year Treasury yield rises above 4.5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp increase in bond yields would signal a shift in monetary policy or economic expectations, directly contradicting the 'HOLD' signal by introducing a new macro driver not present in the 2024 August bottom pattern.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
